title: cert.rs: eliminate usize->u16->usize roundtrip for label_len
description: label_len is computed as label.len().min(24) as u16, then immediately converted back via label_len as usize in two slice operations. The u16 is only needed at the FFI call site. The roundtrip obscures the intent and forces two noisy casts. Rewrite: let label_len_usize = label.len().min(24); let label_len: u16 = label_len_usize as u16; then use label_len_usize for slice indexing and label_len for the FFI call. The comment 'min(24) <= u16::MAX, always safe' can stay on the as u16 line.
